name: Adventure in the Dungeon
short_description: Immerse yourself in the world of 2D action platformer, where you have to fight enemies and overcome obstacles.
detailed_description:
You are a wanderer who has agreed to help in the fight against absolute evil.
But how far are you willing to go into the depths of the dungeon?
And will you be able to cope with this task?


Embark on an exciting adventure!

You have to fight dangerous monsters to get to the very bottom of the dungeon. Who or what is waiting for you there? Find out this by overcoming all the difficulties and obstacles on your way.

what needs to be done

Welcome to the exciting world of 2D dungeon games! In this game, your main goal will be to get to the bottom floor of the dungeon and defeat the final boss.
You will begin your journey on the top floor of the dungeon, where many dangers and mysteries await you. Your character will be able to move in all four directions: forward, backward, left and right. You will have to explore every corner of the dungeon to overcome all obstacles.
On the way to the final boss, you will encounter various monsters. You must use your skills and intelligence to overcome these challenges. Your weapons and upgrades will play an important role in the battles against monsters.
When you reach the top floor, the final boss is waiting for you. Bosses are usually the most powerful enemies in the game, so you will have to use all your skills and tactics to defeat him. Use your strength, dodges and special attacks to win.Get ready for an exciting journey and show everyone that you are capable of defeating the final boss and becoming a real dungeon hero!
